changeSet.author: openelis-gbd-admin-access

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = 'AllLabUnits'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name IN ('GBD Lab Technician', 'GBD Bioinformatician', 'GBD Manager', 'GBD Principal Investigator', 'GBD Data Manager')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.lab_roles lr JOIN clinlims.system_role sr ON lr.role::int = sr.id WHERE lr.lab_unit_role_map_id = (SELECT lab_unit_role_map_id FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = 'AllLabUnits') AND sr.name IN ('GBD Lab Technician', 'GBD Bioinformatician', 'GBD Manager', 'GBD Principal Investigator', 'GBD Data Manager')

changeSet.comment: Add GBD roles to AllLabUnits so admin users get automatic access

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'GBD Lab Technician')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'GBD Bioinformatician')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'GBD Manager')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'GBD Principal Investigator')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'GBD Data Manager')
